text:
13 PRs merged this week. mostly we just made things cheaper and faster.

pricing multipliers are all normalized to 1x now (at-cost). claude inference is cheaper. flux is routing through fireworks so your pixels should arrive quicker. minimax m3 is live.

oh, and 9 new community apps just sprouted in the greenhouse. go build something weird. link in bio.

#pollinations #opensource #aitools #pixelart #creativecoding #indiedev #buildinpublic #llm #webdev #techupdates
